title: ASPECTEK Upgraded 20W Electronic Bug Zapper, Insect Killer - Mosquito, Fly, Moth, Wasp Killer for Indoor - Including 2 Pack Free Replacement Bulbs, Purple Bug Zapper, L, Bug Zapper & Electric
bullet_points: Efficient Insect Control – Uses two high-intensity UV light bulbs to attracts flies, moths, mosquitoes, and other flying insects using two UV light bulbs. Designed for indoor use in kitchens, living areas, and garages.
Zapper Mesh screen: The bug zapper with a mesh screen , preventing accidental contact with the electrical grid

Comfortable: Insects are attracted and easily killed by the insect zapper high voltage metal grids, insect zapper keeping your home Comfortable,noted :Since tiny mosquitos fly very fast, if they do not fly into the power grid, not all mosquitoes can be attacked
SIMPLE INSTALLATION: Hang the Electronic Indoor Insect Killer by attaching the accompanying chain to the hooks on the top of the unit, or simply set on down on a solid surface

Troubleshooting Made Easy – If the unit doesn’t power on, check for loose bulb connections and tighten if needed. Try swapping the bulbs to isolate the issue. Comes with a 2 year warranty, contact our customer service for additional support or replacement assistance.
